ham.subject: Out of Office: Back on July 15
ham.body:
Hi Team,

I will be out of the office from July 10 to July 15 and will not have access to email.
If you need assistance during this period, please contact John Doe at john.doe@example.com.

Thank you,
Alex Smith

spam.subject: Urgent: Immediate Action Required on Your IT Account
spam.body:
Dear Employee,

Our automated security system has detected suspicious activity on your corporate account. To protect your personal data and prevent potential financial loss, we require you to verify your credentials within the next 24 hours.

Please open the attached ticket and confirm your username, employee ID, and the last four digits of your social security number. Failure to comply may result in temporary suspension of your account and loss of access to critical business resources.

Thank you for your prompt attention.

IT Support Team
